Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Petal]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Petal is a member of the crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Petal is the ship's resident alchemist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Petal is a self-trained alchemist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Petal hid behind a barrel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Petal provides a potion that causes Calder to smile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Petal is a member of Calder's crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Petal is a character who visited the main base of the Blackwatch with Andel and Foster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Petal poured powder into a weapon with shaking hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Petal carries a case of potions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Petal is a crewmember who shivers and hides her face in her hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Petal kept a safe distance from Naberius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Petal is a member of the crew who carries a bottled potion.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Petal is a crew member who practices alchemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Petal is mentioned by Andel in relation to the wine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Petal is a character on The Testament who provides first aid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Petal is trembling and clutching her bag.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Petal can brew tea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Petal is twenty-three years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Petal manufactures explosives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Petal is a member of Calder's crew responsible for checking alchemical charges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Petal has a backup set of matches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Petal is an alchemist on Calder's crew who peeks from below deck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Petal is present and expresses that she likes being there.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Petal is an alchemist and a crew member on The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Petal is a crew member intended for potential first aid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Petal possesses a tiny quicklamp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Petal was rejected by the Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Petal found her home on a Navigator's ship.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Petal is a journeyman alchemist by Kanatalia standards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Petal lives on a ship called The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Petal carries a pouch at her waist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Petal is Jyrine's sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Petal craves alchemical knowledge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Petal teared up to match Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — Petal has an acid solution.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — Petal is a crew member working with Foster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Petal is a crew member on The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Petal is tending to Andel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Petal presented an experimental draught to Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Petal is currently staying in a building rented by the Champion's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Petal is a woman who was working with the Champions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Petal believes Calder is not dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Petal has been trying to get people to read her research notes since Calder arrived.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Petal is a person who checks Calder's eyes and reacts emotionally to his condition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Petal researched borrowing the power of a Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Petal provided Calder with a collection of medical supplies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Petal whispered asking what was wrong with Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Petal is on the ramp of The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Petal has enhanced Calder's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Petal devised a cocktail for Redshot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Petal sent a wax-paper packet to Jorin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Petal is a character who gave Andel an encouraging smile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Petal is shivering and appears ready to bolt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Petal uses an alchemical sprayer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Petal threw a glass bottle containing a thick pink liquid at Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Petal is a character who hugged Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — Petal joined the crowd around Foster.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
